display.purpose: Hero headlines on the landing page and major section titles only.

label.purpose: Button text, input labels, metadata, stats.

shadows.name: subtle-edge
shadows.purpose: Default shadow on cards at rest.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Interactive cards and stat cards on hover.

motion.name: duration-200
motion.purpose: Standard state transition duration (hover, focus, active).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single call-to-action per view. Burnt Orange with white text, rounded corners.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #ff7000; color: #fff; font-family: Geist, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.75rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #e05a00; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff7000; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action with border and transparent background.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #1c1917; font-family: Geist, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #e5e0d8; border-radius: 0.75rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #f5f5f4; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff7000; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action with no border, minimal presence.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #78716c; font-family: Geist, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.75rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f5f5f4; color: #1c1917; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff7000; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Clean, minimal text input with warm border and brand-colored focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 2rem; min-width: 0; background: transparent; color: #1c1917; font-family: Geist, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.625rem; border: 1px solid #e5e0d8; border-radius: 0.5rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; line-height: 1.25; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #a8a29e; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #ff7000; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255, 112, 0, 0.15); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Default Card
components.description: Standard content container with subtle border and shadow at rest.
components.html:
Card Title

This is a default card with a subtle border and shadow. Content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card-default { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #ede9e3; border-radius: 1rem; padding: 1.5rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05); }

components.name: Interactive Card
components.description: Clickable card that lifts on hover — used for course cards, stat cards, and navigation tiles.
components.html:
Interactive Card

Hover over me — I lift and glow.
components.css: .ds-card-interactive { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #ede9e3; border-radius: 1rem; padding: 1.5rem; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-card-interactive:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .ds-card-interactive:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff7000; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Featured Card
components.description: Premium content card with brand glow and subtle gradient overlay.
components.html:
Featured Course

This card has a subtle orange glow and gradient for premium content.
components.css: .ds-card-featured { position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(255,112,0,0.2); border-radius: 1rem; padding: 1.5rem; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255,112,0,0.15); } .ds-card-featured::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,112,0,0.05) 0%, transparent 100%); pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Dashboard stat display with accent-colored icon capsule and hover glow.
components.html:
Total Revenue

$12,450

+12.5% from last month
components.css: .ds-card-stat { position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 1rem; padding: 1.25rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05); border: 1px solid #ede9e3; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-card-stat:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Link
components.description: Dashboard sidebar navigation item with role-colored active indicator.
components.html: Dashboard
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.625rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; color: #78716c; font-family: Geist, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; position: relative; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: #f5f2ed; color: #1c1917; } .ds-nav-link--active { background: rgba(255,112,0,0.1); color: #ff7000; } .ds-nav-link--active::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 2px; height: 1.25rem; border-radius: 999px; background: #ff7000; }

components.name: Course Card
components.description: Full course listing card with thumbnail, category pill, metadata, and pricing.
components.html:
Web Dev

Full-Stack JavaScript

Learn modern JavaScript from fundamentals to advanced full-stack development.

4.81.2k12 weeks
Jane Doe25,000 FCFA
components.css: .ds-card-course { overflow: hidden; border-radius: 1rem; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05); border: 1px solid #ede9e3; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-card-course:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); }

narrative.overview:
Rooted, sheltering, and generous — like the iconic African baobab that serves as a village gathering place, SewAfri’s design provides shade for learning, growth, and connection. The interface is warm without being saccharine, confident without being loud. Every surface feels deliberately placed by a human designer who respects the learner’s time and attention.

The system explicitly rejects the generic corporate edtech aesthetic (sterile blues, rigid card grids, dense table UIs) and the telltale signs of AI-generated design (identical cards, templated gradients, stale symmetry). Instead, it favors varied card styles, intentional asymmetry across page layouts, and a warm tonal hierarchy that guides the eye without shouting.
keyCharacteristics: Warm tonal layering over heavy shadows
Rounded corners on cards gently curved (12–16px)
Orange brand accent used with restraint (≤10% of any given screen)
Responsive micro-interactions that feel tactile, not gratuitous
Dark mode with warm undertones, not pure gray

rules.name: The Burnt Orange Rule
rules.body: The primary accent may not exceed 10% of any screen. Its rarity gives it power. CTAs, active nav indicators, and one decorative element per view — nothing more.

rules.name: The Warmth Rule
rules.body: No pure white, no pure black, no cool grays. Every neutral is tinted warm.

rules.name: The Heading Rule
rules.body: Space Grotesk is reserved for hierarchy. Never use it for paragraph body text. Geist handles all reading.

rules.name: The No-Heavy-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Tonal layering carries hierarchy. Shadows are for hover feedback and modal separation only.

dos: Do use Burnt Orange (#ff7000) sparingly — one CTA, one active indicator, one decorative element per screen. Its rarity is its power.
Do lean on tonal layering for depth: card surfaces sit a tone above the page; raised elements sit a tone above cards.
Do vary card styles across a page — mix default, interactive, and inset variants so no two sections look templated.
Do use the warm, cream-based palette in light mode and the espresso-based palette in dark mode.
Do use Space Grotesk for headings only. Body text is always Geist.
Do provide hover and focus-visible feedback on every interactive element.
donts: Don't use generic corporate edtech aesthetics — no sterile blues, rigid card grids, or dense table UIs.
Don't create the "AI-generated" look — no identical cards in a row, no templated gradients.
Don't use heavy box-shadows as the primary depth cue. Tonal layering carries hierarchy.
Don't use cool or neutral grays. Every neutral must be warm-toned.
Don't exceed the 10% Burnt Orange rule.
Don't use pure black (#000) or pure white (#fff) anywhere in the interface.
Don't animate gratuitously — motion should confirm interaction, not decorate.
